tagline: Dessert tables with a little sparkle and a lot of plan.

hero.title: Sugarline dessert table catering hero image
hero.alt: An elegant dessert table with tiered cake, macarons, fruit tarts, small sweets, and a bakery stylist placing final desserts.

contact.serviceArea: Dessert tables, bakery catering, cake-and-mini spreads, shower sweets, birthday tables, corporate dessert bars, and celebration delivery for River Market, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, and nearby event rooms

copy.eyebrow: Dessert tables designed around the room
copy.heroTitle: Dessert tables that wow before the first bite.
copy.heroText: Sugarline plans the look, quantities, flavors, setup timing, and serving details so the table feels generous, styled, and easy for guests to enjoy.
copy.introTitle: Pretty has to portion correctly, too.
copy.introText: We balance centerpiece sweets, bite-size pieces, dietary notes, serving height, room palette, and how long the table needs to stay fresh.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to design the dessert table?
copy.quoteText: Check availability with date, guest count, venue, palette, favorite flavors, and any inspiration photos. We will shape a table direction and quote path.

services.title: Signature Dessert Table
services.text: A styled spread with cake, small sweets, serving notes, risers, and flavor balance for birthdays, showers, and celebrations.

services.title: Mini Sweets Bar
services.text: Macarons, tarts, bars, cookies, and bite-size options arranged for easy grazing and clean replenishment.

services.title: Cake Plus Companions
services.text: A centerpiece cake with supporting desserts so the table looks full and portions make sense.

process.title: Share the room and guest count
process.text: We plan quantities, palette, venue rules, and table size before flavor talk gets too dreamy.

process.title: Set the style board
process.text: You get a direction for colors, heights, flavors, and serving pieces that fits the event.

process.title: Deliver and finish
process.text: We arrive with timing notes, place final pieces, and leave simple serving guidance.
